documents.title: Moonwell Shrine
documents.text: The moonwell shrine restores spent spell slots only when a silver leaf is placed on the water at dusk.

documents.title: Iron Gate Password
documents.text: The iron gate opens for the password emberglass, spoken after the western torch is extinguished.

documents.title: River Market Schedule
documents.text: The river market arrives every third dawn with spice barges, map sellers, and ferry captains.

documents.title: Glass Orb Decoy
documents.text: The glass orb glows like moonlight but stores no spells and has no effect on the moonwell ritual.

queries.text: What item must be placed on the moonwell at dusk to restore spell slots?
Which password opens the iron gate after a torch is put out?
